name: Bean Vegetable Medley
recipeIngredient: 1 Medium green pepper, cut into strips
1 Package Frozen baby lima beans (10 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onion, celery, and green pepper; cook slowly for 10 minutes without browning.
3. Stir in tomatoes, kidney beans, barley, parsley, salt, basil, and black pepper.
4. Transfer mixture to a buttered 2-to-3 quart casserole with lid.
5. Pour boiling water over the mixture until just covered.
6. Cover and bake at 350°F for 1½ hours or until barley is tender and liquid is absorbed.
7. Sprinkle with grated cheese before serving.
Good served with: Marinated, slightly blanched mixed vegetables, hot French bread, and butter.
